subcodes.first_line: In these days the dwellers of Paradise and the sanctified realms have given, and continue to give, unto all the glad-tidings. The first such tidings is that His Holiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این ایام اهل فردوس و حظائر قدس کل را بشارت داده و میدهند بشارت اولی آنکه حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
